semantic.role: Infrastructure utility module providing environment variable parsing constants and functions.
responsibilities: Defines the environment variable name 'SPINE_PRECOMMIT' used to control pre-commit hook behavior.
Parses string environment variable values into boolean true/false/undefined based on common truthy/falsy string representations.
outOfScope: Acting as a facade for other infrastructure modules
invariants: Exports stable low-level environment parsing utilities
Pure functions with no side effects
No dependencies on other project modules

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide a stable, isolated utility for environment variable parsing to be used across the infrastructure layer.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes detected in this file; recent commit 'infra: harden runtime database and llm client stability' does not apply here.
